info.title: confext
info.description:
Tool to extract configuration values from appsettings.json. Piping and redirecting of stdin and stdout is fully supported.
      For example `$confext < appsetting.json >> >> config.env` or on Windows `>type appsetting.json | confext`.

options.description: File to read or ignore to read from stdin

options.name: output

options.name: prefix
options.description: Value to prefix configuration keys read
